description: Known gene-pseudogene pairs for DGRA artifact detection. Detection strategies: vaf_mismatch (VAF deviation from expected heterozygous 0.5), sequence_homology (sequence-level paralogy without VAF-specific thresholds).

VWF.notes: VWFP1 on chr1 shares homology with VWF exons 23-34. Low VAF suggests reads mapping to pseudogene.

SETBP1.notes: SETBP1 adjacent to VWFP1 homology region on chr18.

GUSB.notes: GUSBP1/GUSBP2 are processed pseudogenes with high sequence homology to GUSB. Detection via read mapping patterns, not VAF thresholds.

GBA.notes: GBAP1 on chr1 is a highly homologous pseudogene. GBAP1 recombination causes Gaucher disease misdiagnosis.

PMS2.notes: PMS2CL on chr7 shares homology with PMS2. Low VAF suggests reads mapping to pseudogene.
